pages.text: It’s the holidays and I’d love to go to the beach, but we have never been. I wonder what it feels like to play in the sea sand.

blocks.text: It’s the holidays and I’d love to go to the beach, but we have never been.
I wonder what it feels like to play in the sea sand.

pages.text: Surprise! ‘Look what we made you. A sandbox,’ exclaims Lesedi’s dad. Dad says he used some of his old tyres. Mom painted them with all my favourite colours: blue, red and yellow.

blocks.text: Surprise!
‘Look what we made you. A sandbox,’ exclaims Lesedi’s dad.
Dad says he used some of his old tyres. Mom painted them with all my favourite colours: blue, red and yellow.

pages.text: I can’t wait to get inside. I climb into my sandbox and my feet feel so warm and squishy.

blocks.text: I can’t wait to get inside.
I climb into my sandbox and my feet feel so warm and squishy.

pages.text: Look! I’m at the beach. That looks like a good spot to spread my blanket. I set up my umbrella, but the wind blows it away.

blocks.text: Look!
I’m at the beach.
That looks like a good spot to spread my blanket.
I set up my umbrella, but the wind blows it away.

pages.text: The ocean makes a roaring sound. I run on the beach, daring the waves to catch me as I make footprints in the sand.

blocks.text: The ocean makes a roaring sound.
I run on the beach, daring the waves to catch me as I make footprints in the sand.

pages.text: Using my bucket and spade, I dig for shells. They come in many shapes and sizes.

blocks.text: Using my bucket and spade, I dig for shells.
They come in many shapes and sizes.

pages.text: Let me build a sandcastle. Wow, that’s huge!

blocks.text: Let me build a sandcastle. Wow, that’s huge!

pages.text: It’s lunchtime! Maybe I should have a strawberry jam sandwich. Mmm, my favourite.

blocks.text: It’s lunchtime!
Maybe I should have a strawberry jam sandwich.
Mmm, my favourite.

pages.text: For dessert, Mom brings me some chocolate ice cream.

blocks.text: For dessert, Mom brings me some chocolate ice cream.

pages.text: I lie on my blanket enjoying my ice cream and gaze at the sky turning pink.

blocks.text: I lie on my blanket enjoying my ice cream and gaze at the sky turning pink.

pages.text: Lesedi’s mom and dad watch him, their eyes beaming with pleasure. ‘I’m so happy we could make his dream come true right here at home,’ Lesedi’s mom says.

blocks.text: Lesedi’s mom and dad watch him, their eyes beaming with pleasure.
‘I’m so happy we could make his dream come true right here at home,’ Lesedi’s mom says.

pages.text: Thank you, Mom and Dad. Today was the happiest day of my life!

blocks.text: Thank you, Mom and Dad.
Today was the happiest day of my life!
